title: arnica angustifolia subsp. alpina
intro: Arnica angustifolia subsp. alpina, commonly known as alpine arnica, is a subspecies of the arnica plant, which is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of alpine arnica include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of alpine arnica include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Alpine arnica is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and creams, which can be applied topically to the affected area to harness its medicinal properties.
